nodes.label: Translates text by calling our local IndicTrans2 translation service on port 800
nodes.norm_label: translates text by calling our local indictrans2 translation service on port 800

nodes.norm_label: reads data from sqlite, converts text to embeddings, and uploads to qdrant.

nodes.norm_label: takes a plain text query, converts it to an embedding, and asks qdrant      to f

nodes.label: Returns the health status of the STT service.
nodes.norm_label: returns the health status of the stt service.

nodes.norm_label: transcribes an uploaded audio file using faster-whisper.

nodes.label: transcribeAudio (JNI)
nodes.description: JNI wrapper function to expose whisper.cpp STT to Kotlin

nodes.label: IslamicGreen
nodes.description: Primary brand dark green color for primary buttons and success banners.

nodes.label: QuranicBlue
nodes.description: Accent calm blue color for clickable links and citations.

nodes.label: OfflineOrange
nodes.description: Bright orange color for the offline status banner.

nodes.label: ErrorRed
nodes.description: Error red color for warning states and network connection errors.

nodes.label: BackgroundCream
nodes.description: Soft warm yellow/white color for screen backgrounds.

nodes.label: TextPrimary
nodes.description: Soft black/grey color for high contrast readable text.

nodes.label: Typography
nodes.description: Defines the text styles (fonts, sizes, weights) used across the app.
nodes.rationale: Material3 Typography maps common text roles to specific TextStyles. Declaring sizes in scale-independent pixels ensures accessibility settings are honored.

nodes.label: build.gradle.kts
nodes.description: Configures tools and versions used across the entire project.

nodes.label: settings.gradle.kts
nodes.description: Defines the project name and where to find libraries.

nodes.label: Project Architecture
nodes.description: Six-layer project architecture for Rushd-ul-Ilm app including Android UI, Backend Docker, Knowledge Ingestion, etc.

nodes.label: Three-Tier Offline Fallback
nodes.description: Fallback mechanism ensuring app works via Internet, LAN, or fully Offline.

nodes.label: AI System Prompt Rules
nodes.description: Instructions for AI coding agents to follow teaching rules, anti-hallucination rules, and UI guidelines.

nodes.label: Project Overview
nodes.description: High-level overview of the app's purpose, target audience, and technology stack choices.

nodes.label: Android App Layer
nodes.description: Details about the MVVM architecture, Jetpack Compose screens, and navigation.

nodes.label: Knowledge Ingestion
nodes.description: Process of vectorizing fatwas using paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM and storing in Qdrant.

nodes.label: Translation Pipeline
nodes.description: Multilingual translation using IndicTrans2 models.

nodes.label: Video Database
nodes.description: Scraping, indexing, and transcribing Islamic video lectures using yt-dlp and faster-whisper.

nodes.label: Backend Docker Services
nodes.description: Docker Compose setup for FastAPI, Qdrant, Ollama, IndicTrans2, Parler-TTS, and faster-whisper.

nodes.label: Micro-Task System
nodes.description: The methodology for breaking down project phases into sprints and micro-tasks for AI execution.

nodes.label: FastAPI Service
nodes.description: Main python web application service running FastAPI on port 8000.

nodes.label: Qdrant Service
nodes.description: Vector database service container running Qdrant on port 6333.

nodes.label: IndicTrans2 Service
nodes.description: Service running the IndicTrans2 machine translation models on port 8001.

nodes.label: FastAPI
nodes.description: Modern web framework for building APIs.

nodes.label: Uvicorn
nodes.description: ASGI server that runs the FastAPI application.

nodes.label: Qdrant Client
nodes.description: Client library for Qdrant vector database.

nodes.label: LlamaIndex Core
nodes.description: Core library for building RAG pipelines.

nodes.label: sentence-transformers
nodes.description: Converts text into vector embeddings.

nodes.label: IndicTransToolkit
nodes.description: Toolkit for IndicTrans2 translation models.

nodes.label: faster-whisper
nodes.description: Accelerated Whisper engine for speech-to-text.

nodes.label: namaz.mp3
nodes.description: Audio file for Namaz content.

nodes.label: namaz.wav
nodes.description: Audio file for Namaz content.

nodes.label: wazu.mp3
nodes.description: Audio file for Wazu content.

nodes.label: wazu.wav
nodes.description: Audio file for Wazu content.

nodes.label: Qwen3:4b
nodes.description: Local LLM used for generating cited answers.
nodes.rationale: Selected because it fits the 4GB VRAM limit on the developer's machine.

nodes.label: Qdrant
nodes.description: Vector database used for semantic search.

nodes.label: IndicTrans2
nodes.description: Translation engine for Telugu/Urdu to English.

nodes.label: faster-whisper-large-v3-turbo
nodes.description: Online STT engine for Telugu and Urdu.

nodes.label: Graphiti
nodes.description: Temporal knowledge graph memory for AI agents.

nodes.label: Mem0
nodes.description: Cross-session AI agent memory.
